title: ultra optimization on vulkan
description: Ultra Optimization on Vulkan is a mod for low-end PCs, enhancing performance and ensuring smooth gameplay using the Vulkan API.
body:
**Ultra Optimization on Vulkan — Optimization Modpack for Low-End PCs**

Ultra Optimization on Vulkan is a powerful modpack designed for players with very low-end computers who want to achieve maximum performance in Minecraft. The core of this build is the Vulkan mod, which optimizes graphics and frame processing, allowing for smooth gameplay even on the most modest systems.

**Key Features of the Modpack:**
- **High Performance:** On average, the modpack provides 800 FPS in survival mode with default Minecraft settings (tested on a system with a GTX 1050Ti, Ryzen 5 1600, and 16GB DDR4 RAM).
- **Suitable for Low-End PCs:** Thanks to Vulkan optimizations, this build allows Minecraft to run much smoother, reducing the load on both the CPU and GPU.
